ddls:
CREATE TABLE "crime_incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime incident */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property involved in the incident */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date the incident occurred */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the incident occurred */,
  "nibrs_code" INTEGER /* NIBRS code associated with the incident */,
  "incident_status" TEXT /* Current status of the incident (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "incident_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the incident */,
  "incident_priority" TEXT /* Urgency level of the incident */,
  "incident_reported_by" TEXT /* Person or entity that reported the incident */,
  "incident_reported_date" TEXT /* Date the incident was reported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_incidents_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_incidents_nibrs_code FOREIGN KEY ("nibrs_code") REFERENCES nibrs_codes ("nibrs_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_incidents_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "prop_desc_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property description */,
  "property_value" REAL /* Value of the property */,
  "date_recovered" TEXT /* Date the property was recovered */,
  "property_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the property */,
  "property_model" TEXT /* Model of the property */,
  "property_brand" TEXT /* Brand of the property */,
  "property_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the property when recovered */,
  "property_damage_description" TEXT /* Description of any damage to the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_prop_desc_id FOREIGN KEY ("prop_desc_id") REFERENCES property_descriptions ("prop_desc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_descriptions" (
  "prop_desc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property description */,
  "prop_desc_name" TEXT /* Name of the property description */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property description */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the property */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prop_desc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nibrs_codes" (
  "nibrs_code" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each NIBRS code */,
  "nibrs_name" TEXT /* Name of the NIBRS code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the NIBRS code */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the crime */,
  "crime_category" TEXT /* Category of the crime */,
  "crime_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the crime */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nibrs_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of the location (e.g., residence, business) */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Neighborhood where the location is situated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each officer */,
  "officer_name" TEXT /* Name of the officer */,
  "badge_number" INTEGER /* Badge number of the officer */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the officer belongs to */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the officer */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the officer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the officer */,
  "date_of_appointment" TEXT /* Date the officer was appointed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the officer (e.g., active, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investigations" (
  "investigation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investigation */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crime incident being investigated */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the officer conducting the investigation */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the investigation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the investigation */,
  "investigation_status" TEXT /* Status of the investigation (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "investigation_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the investigation */,
  "investigation_outcomes" TEXT /* Outcomes of the investigation */,
  "investigation_team" TEXT /* List of officers involved in the investigation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investigation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investigations_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("officer_id") REFERENCES officers ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investigations_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES crime_incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recovered_properties" (
  "recovered_property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recovered property */,
  "investigation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the investigation that recovered the property */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property recovered */,
  "date_recovered" TEXT /* Date the property was recovered */,
  "recovery_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the recovery */,
  "recovery_location" TEXT /* Location where the property was recovered */,
  "recovery_officer" TEXT /* Officer who recovered the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recovered_property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recovered_properties_investigation_id FOREIGN KEY ("investigation_id") REFERENCES investigations ("investigation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recovered_properties_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "officer_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crime incident the officer is assigned to */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the officer assigned */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the officer was assigned */,
  "assignment_status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "assignment_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_officer_assignments_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES crime_incidents ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_officer_assignments_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("officer_id") REFERENCES officers ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., officer, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "last_login_ip" TEXT /* Last IP address the user logged in from */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime incident being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "device_used" TEXT /* Device used to access the data */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the user's session in seconds */,
  "activity_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the user's activity during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES crime_incidents ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
